title: gerascanthus mhaya
intro: Gerascanthus mhaya, a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, is commonly known as the Mhaya tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gerascanthus mhaya include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Gerascanthus mhaya is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, with the leaves and bark being used to make a medicinal infusion.
